# KarmaVerse

> India's first circular economy rewards platform — schedule free doorstep pickups for plastic, paper, metal, e-waste & more, and earn KarmaCoins XP for every kg you recycle. Built by 3R Zero Waste.

KarmaVerse is a mobile and web app that lets households across India request free doorstep
recycling pickups (plastic, paper, metal, e-waste, textile, cardboard, and more). A verified
agent collects, weighs, and confirms the items on the spot, and KarmaCoins XP are credited to
the user's wallet immediately. Coins are redeemable for eco-friendly products, tree planting,
or charitable donations. It is operated by 3R Zero Waste, a waste-management company based in
Gurugram, Haryana, India.

## Key facts

- Doorstep pickup is 100% free — no cost to the user, ever
- 10 waste categories accepted: plastic, paper, metal, e-waste, textile, cardboard, and more
- 1.85 Lakh+ (185,000+) citizens reached with recycling awareness so far
- Rewards: KarmaCoins XP earned per kg recycled, redeemable for products, tree planting, or donations
- Referral program: both the referrer and the new user each earn 1,000 KarmaCoins XP
- Also includes a daily eco-quiz for additional KarmaCoins XP
- Operator: 3R Zero Waste, Plot 62, Sector 8 Rd, IMT Manesar, Gurugram, Haryana 122503, India
